SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 303, JUDGE: DOUGLAS C. MUNSON; CLERK: DAVID SWANSON; REPORTER: MARY HINDS #2011. STEVEN WILLIAMS APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS APPEARED IN PRO PER. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. THE CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SECURITY DEPOSITS. BOTH SIDES WAIVE FEES AND COSTS. DEFENDANTS TO VACATE PREMISES OF 8344 GEARY BLVD. BY 3/31/02 BY 5PM AND DELIVER ALL KEYS TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS WAIVE RIGHT TO TRIAL AND WITHDRAW RENT BOARD PETITIONS. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANTS $2000 BY 3/18/02. PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-18-2002 - JUDGMENT ENTERED 3/12/02.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Steven Williams appeared on behalf of the Plaintiff and Defendants appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held. The case settled on the record. Defendants waive security deposits. Both sides waive fees and costs. Defendants to vacate premises of 8344 Geary Blvd. by 3/31/02 by 5pm and deliver all keys to Plaintiff. Defendants waive right to trial and withdraw rent board petitions. Plaintiff to pay Defendants $2000 by 3/18/02. Plaintiff waives back rent.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Advanced From Mar-11-02 To Feb-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Steven C. Williams, Esq. 552-8230 for Plaintiff PENNY BALOGH opposing party
No appearance by defendant MICHAEL DAVID TARDIFF demurring party. Tentative ruling adopted -- demurrer OVERRULED with 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court.
(JJM/MD) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759
